languages.text: Кузнец каким-то образом умудрился выковать гильзы и патроны. Странная находка на феодальном мире, но нет сомнений, что это именно они.
The blacksmith has somehow managed to forge shells and casings. These are unusual objects to find on a feudal world, but there is no doubt as to what they are.
languages.original_text: Кузнец каким-то образом умудрился выковать гильзы и патроны. Странная находка на феодальном мире, но нет сомнений, что это именно они.

traits.locale_text: The blacksmith somehow managed to forge shells and casings. Odd things to find on a feudal world, but there is no doubt as to what they are.

The blacksmith has somehow managed to forge shells and casings. These are unusual objects to find on a feudal world, but there is no doubt as to what they are.

languages.text: 鍛冶屋はどうにか、砲弾や薬莢の鍛造に成功したようだ。封建惑星では珍しい品だが、その正体については疑いようがない。
languages.original_text: The blacksmith has somehow managed to forge shells and casings. These are unusual objects to find on a feudal world, but there is no doubt as to what they are.

traits.locale_text: 鍛冶屋はどうにか、砲弾や薬莢の鍛造に成功したようだ。封建惑星では珍しい品だが、その正体については疑いようがない。

languages.text: Demirci her nasılsa kabuk ve mühimmat kovanı dövmeyi başarmış. Feodal dünyada bunlara zor rastlansa da ne oldukları konusunda en ufak şüpheye yer yok.
languages.original_text: The blacksmith has somehow managed to forge shells and casings. These are unusual objects to find on a feudal world, but there is no doubt as to what they are.

traits.locale_text: Demirci her nasılsa kabuk ve mühimmat kovanı dövmeyi başarmış. Feodal dünyada bunlara zor rastlansa da ne oldukları konusunda en ufak şüpheye yer yok.

languages.text: El herrero ha conseguido forjar cartuchos y casquillos. Son un hallazgo singular en un mundo feudal, pero son inconfundibles.
languages.original_text: The blacksmith has somehow managed to forge shells and casings. These are unusual objects to find on a feudal world, but there is no doubt as to what they are.

traits.locale_text: El herrero ha conseguido forjar cartuchos y casquillos. Son un hallazgo singular en un mundo feudal, pero son inconfundibles.

languages.text: 这个铁匠不知用了什么方法，居然真的造出了子弹弹壳。尽管这些东西在封建世界里非常罕见，但毫无疑问，它们都是真家伙。
languages.original_text: The blacksmith has somehow managed to forge shells and casings. These are unusual objects to find on a feudal world, but there is no doubt as to what they are.

traits.locale_text: 这个铁匠不知用了什么方法，居然真的造出了子弹弹壳。尽管这些东西在封建世界里非常罕见，但毫无疑问，它们都是真家伙。

languages.text: D'une manière ou d'une autre, le forgeron a réussi à fabriquer des obus et autres cartouches. Ce sont des objets inhabituels pour un monde féodal, mais leur nature ne fait aucun doute.
languages.original_text: The blacksmith has somehow managed to forge shells and casings. These are unusual objects to find on a feudal world, but there is no doubt as to what they are.

traits.locale_text: D'une manière ou d'une autre, le forgeron a réussi à fabriquer des obus et autres cartouches. Ce sont des objets inhabituels pour un monde féodal, mais leur nature ne fait aucun doute.

languages.text: Dem Schmied ist es irgendwie gelungen, Granaten und Hülsen zu schmieden. Das sind ungewöhnliche Objekte für eine Feudalwelt, aber es besteht kein Zweifel, worum es sich dabei handelt.
languages.original_text: The blacksmith has somehow managed to forge shells and casings. These are unusual objects to find on a feudal world, but there is no doubt as to what they are.

traits.locale_text: Dem Schmied ist es irgendwie gelungen, Granaten und Hülsen zu schmieden. Das sind ungewöhnliche Objekte für eine Feudalwelt, aber es besteht kein Zweifel, worum es sich dabei handelt.
